sub_modules.highpass_fir_delay_next: Purely combinational next-state generator for the FIR sample delay line. It inserts the current valid input sample at tap 0 and shifts older samples toward higher tap indices.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeffs: Purely combinational coefficient ROM/packer. It hard-codes the required 101 signed 16-bit high-pass FIR coefficients verbatim and exposes them as a flattened coefficient bus.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Purely combinational fixed-point multiply-accumulate datapath. It multiplies each delayed signed sample by its signed coefficient and accumulates the full result in a 64-bit signed accumulator.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_quantize: Purely combinational output scaler. It performs the required arithmetic right shift by 15 bits and returns the low output-width signed result.
